Core result: Line and paragraph positional constraints survive permutation baselines.

Main question: Does Voynich resemble natural language statistically?
Core result: Entropy and ambiguity correlations exceed 0.95 while suffix and prefix-family structure diverge.
Suffix is strongly predicted by core: H(suffix|core) = 0.8370; top-1 accuracy = 79.11%.
PCS model achieves 97.02% matching and 85.25% token mass coverage.
Real sequences show lower entropy, higher prediction accuracy, and local family clustering.
